channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: RAG in prod: 3 silent killers
item.description: Cut RAG retrieval latency from 4.2s to 280ms without spending more — how we split indices, tuned refresh rates, and built a two-tier cache using OpenSearch 2.11, Redis 7.2, and Python 3.11

item.title: 2026 AI Pay: LLM vs Embeddings Data
item.description: LLM vs embeddings salaries in 2026: $195k vs $178k — real skills that move the needle and the specific mistakes that cost teams $47k in fines

item.title: Default max pool is wrong: set it higher
item.description: 80% of requests queued for a connection, adding 400ms–800ms to every API call.

item.title: Senior exodus: what kills velocity in Big Tech
item.description: Cut senior engineer attrition 40% by fixing latency alerts and MTTD — Prometheus, Grafana, and Go 1.22 lab with real numbers and actionable steps.

item.title: Break GitHub’s noise, land remote jobs
item.description: Portfolio that converts remote jobs: show impact, not code. Three real case studies with latency, cost, and error-rate metrics. 2026 hiring data included.

item.title: Salary negotiation: USD rates from LATAM in 2026
item.description: Calculate USD salary from LATAM in 2026 using PPP, Glassdoor, and Levels.fyi — get $23k more by attaching data to your counter-offer

item.title: Async Python: GIL, I/O, and where it fails
item.description: Async Python cuts API latency 12× in benchmarks — but one blocking call drops throughput 200×. Learn when to use asyncio and when to avoid it.

item.title: Turn local costs into remote salary wins
item.description: Negotiate remote salary from a lower-cost country: $92k total comp, buffer math, Levels.fyi 2026, and the Loom that closed the deal.

item.title: RAG pipelines crash at 10k QPS
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline costs 30% with RedisSearch HNSW — latency dropped from 850ms to 15ms at 10k QPS, with recall at 97% and bill from $4,800 to $3,400/month

item.title: 2026 salary boost: PyTorch vs TensorFlow ROI
item.description: PyTorch salaries 2026 are 28% higher than TensorFlow’s — but only for teams that need dynamic graphs. See the latency, cost, and hiring data that decides which framework to bet on.

item.title: Too-small DB pools ruin CPU savings
item.description: Set max pool size too low? Your app is 3x slower — connection pool tuning in 2026 with concrete numbers, benchmarks, and the one metric that exposes the bottleneck most teams miss.

item.title: Senior devs flee: the soft killers
item.description: Senior engineers quit big tech even when pay is $320k–$550k — here’s what actually drives them away: bureaucracy, ambiguity, and fire-drill culture. Learn the three metrics that predict attrition and how to fix them before your team starts emptying out.

item.title: Pick the right platform: African devs 2026
item.description: Earnings, payout days, and paperwork compared for Andela, Toptal, and Arc in 2026 — real data from three platforms, three weeks of testing, and the exact script to decide which one works for you.

item.title: Match global remote pay to local life
item.description: Double your effective remote salary with a 4-email sequence — tax calculators, hidden cost tables, and real 2026 numbers for Colombia, Mexico, and Brazil.

item.title: 3-5 yr engineers flee FAANG: not pay
item.description: 10k+ engineers quit Big Tech in 2026 for reasons beyond pay — deploy time, rollback speed, and cognitive load. Learn the hidden costs and build a system you can ship in 4 minutes.

item.title: Remote jobs from Africa: stop showing work, show value
item.description: Remote hiring teams ignore GitHub portfolios in 2026 unless they show business impact. Learn how to frame your work as case studies with real metrics and live demos that get you past the first round.

item.title: RAG pipelines: 240ms to 80ms without rewriting models
item.description: Cut RAG latency 67% and costs 32% with pgvector 0.6.0, scalar quantization, and language filtering — the three levers tutorials never mention.

item.title: 2026 AI Salaries: What Actually Pays
item.description: AI skills that move your salary in 2026: prompt engineering vs observability — benchmarked with real salary data, concrete numbers, and production stacks.

item.title: Pool size isn't CPU cores
item.description: Set max pool size to CPU cores? Wrong. Use peak RPS × P95 latency to size your connection pool—here’s the data and code to prove it.

item.title: Senior devs quit big tech over this
item.description: Cut on-call burnout 80% with Redis cache locks and pool sizing — the hidden reasons senior developers leave big tech in 2026
